calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-15-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Default Judgment.

Petitioner People of the State of California's unopposed Motion For Default Judgment is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing, the court will enter default judgment against Respondent Property $616,680.00 U.S. Currency and declare the Respondent Property forfeited pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 11470 et seq. and order respondent Property distributed pursuant to Health and Safety Code section 11489. The court will enter the proposed order/judgment submitted with the moving papers.

Order and default judgment are signed.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
